headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Receives FDA Clearance for Asurys Fluid Management System
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is one of the 10 Best Growth Stocks to Buy for the Next Decade. headline: Penumbra Sale To Boston Scientific Sparks Review Of Deal Value
summary: Boston Scientific has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Penumbra (NYSE:PEN). A law firm has announced an investigation into whether the sale process and terms of the transaction are fair to Penumbra shareholders. The deal and the legal review arrive at a time when Penumbra’s share price stands at $329.52. For investors following NYSE:PEN, the agreed sale to Boston Scientific comes after a period of solid longer term returns, including 22.7% over the past year and 19.0% over...
